_comment: Chat-responder workflow — auto-replies to human chat in per-IP rooms and the _global room. Launch per room as its own session: python src/main.py -s atlas-helper/<ip-or-_global>/chat-responder -w chat-responder

meta.name: chat-responder
meta.description: ATLAS Helper bot — answers human feedback in per-IP and _global Orchestrator Chat rooms.

env._comment: Pulled from .env: CHAT_RESPONDER_MODEL (default gpt-5.3-codex), CHAT_RESPONDER_EFFORT (default low), CHAT_RESPONDER_POLL_SECONDS, CHAT_RESPONDER_MIN_INTERVAL_SECONDS, CHAT_RESPONDER_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS.
